intro.en: is from [Hokkien](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fujian). They study composition and piano technology at the [Eastman School of Music](https://www.esm.rochester.edu).
intro.zh: 來自福建，在[伊斯曼音樂學院](https://www.esm.rochester.edu)研習作曲與鋼琴維修技術。

imageAlt: An annotated orchestral manuscript resting on a wooden table.
